title: ITALY enforcement action against Lex Iuris S.r.l. (15,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 15,000 on Lex Iuris S.r.l. The controller sent promotional emails to data subjects after mistakenly transferring those email addresses to a marketing list without their consent.
